evidence_summary: To escalate the physical stakes and demonstrate the grueling environmental hardship of Mars.

The group attempts a two-hundred-mile trek across the Mossy Waste toward Helium. Exhaustion, hunger, and thirst take their toll; one thoat collapses, forcing the party to struggle on foot through the desolate landscape.
